title: Ceramic Blue Tile
description: Premium ceramic tile with a smooth blue glaze finish. Ideal for modern interiors, this tile is water-resistant, easy to maintain, and suitable for both wall and floor applications.

title: Marble White Tile
description: Elegant white marble tile featuring natural vein patterns. Perfect for luxury interiors, offering a polished surface and long-lasting durability.

title: Granite Black Tile
description: Durable granite tile with a polished black finish. Designed for high-traffic areas, it is scratch-resistant and extremely long-lasting.

title: Wooden Texture Tile
description: Wood-look porcelain tile with realistic grain texture. Provides a warm natural feel while being moisture-resistant and durable for modern flooring.

title: Geometric Pattern Tile
description: Modern geometric patterned ceramic tile that enhances visual appeal. Ideal for feature walls and stylish decorative flooring.

title: Concrete Grey Tile
description: Industrial-style concrete finish tile with a minimalist look. Perfect for contemporary spaces and highly durable for everyday use.

title: Mosaic Glass Tile
description: Decorative mosaic tile made from high-quality glass with a glossy finish. Adds vibrant detail to kitchens, bathrooms, and feature walls.

title: Terracotta Rustic Tile
description: Rustic terracotta tile with warm earthy tones. Perfect for traditional and outdoor spaces, offering a natural and timeless look.

title: Hexagon White Tile
description: Minimal hexagon-shaped tile with a clean matte finish. Ideal for modern and geometric interior designs.

title: Luxury Gold Vein Marble
description: Premium marble tile with elegant gold veins. Designed for high-end interiors, offering a luxurious and polished finish.

title: Matte Black Tile
description: Modern matte black ceramic tile with a sleek finish. Perfect for contemporary spaces and bold interior designs.

title: Subway White Tile
description: Classic subway-style ceramic tile with a glossy white finish. Ideal for kitchen backsplashes and bathroom walls.

title: Slate Stone Tile
description: Natural slate tile with a textured surface. Provides a rugged and organic look suitable for both indoor and outdoor use.

title: Blue Mosaic Tile
description: Glossy blue mosaic tile designed for decorative applications. Adds color and depth to feature walls and accents.

title: Beige Porcelain Tile
description: Soft beige porcelain tile with a smooth finish. Perfect for neutral interiors, offering durability and easy maintenance.

title: Vintage Pattern Tile
description: Retro-style patterned tile inspired by vintage designs. Ideal for adding character to floors and feature walls.

title: Dark Concrete Tile
description: Dark concrete-look tile with an industrial finish. Suitable for modern spaces requiring a bold and minimal aesthetic.

title: Glossy White Tile
description: High-gloss white ceramic tile that reflects light beautifully. Ideal for bright and clean interior designs.

title: Natural Stone Tile
description: Natural stone tile with organic textures and earthy tones. Provides a raw and authentic look for any space.

title: 3D Texture Wall Tile
description: 3D textured wall tile designed to create depth and visual interest. Perfect for feature walls in modern interiors.
